summary: CRITICAL: Task is incomplete. Missing semantic-version-bumper.bats test file (core requirement). Workflow not validated with actionlint. Actions not pinned to SHA (only @v4, should be full commit hash). No act-result.txt artifact. Script issues: fragile JSON parsing via sed instead of jq (lines 64-68), tag_ref logic duplicated in analyze_commits & generate_changelog (lines 80-85, 156-161), unquoted variables in git commands (lines 87-100), no validation that major/minor/patch are numeric (line 104-107). Demo job doesn't fully test conventional commit detection or verify version bumping works end-to-end.
